Aishat Bello · Digital & Growth Marketer
About Me

The Strategist
Behind the Growth

Hi, I'm Aishat Bello, a digital growth marketer who does marketing using storytelling, creativity, strategy and technology. I believe in the power of words and I believe marketing done right can move people.

My approach to marketing is starting from the basics, the funnel. I understand the first touch is important and this can create loyal customers. I use this understanding to create campaigns that perform and compound. I bring a rare combination of storytelling, paid media execution, human-focused thinking and AI automation to every project.

I started out as a confused business owner, to being a digital marketer and a growth partner, because your growth is important to me. I connect the dots of brand voice, audience psychology and measurable ROI.

🧠
Strategic Thinker
The part where my overthinking skills comes to play with pictorial evidence and not just jumping into execution mode.
✍🏾
Natural Storyteller
Everyone loves a good "TEA". I always have an empty seat at my table, ready to drop copies that connect.
🤖
AI-Empowered
I work smarter by automating processes that help businesses save time and money.
📈
Growth-Oriented
I'm obsessed with growth and always looking forward to scaling.
Why Me

What Sets Me Apart

I believe there's always a why in marketing. For me, I don't just have nice skills. I have strategic advantages that I bring to every brand, campaign and team I work with.

🔗
Funnel Fluency
Starting from awareness to conversion, to retention to advocacy, giving complete end-to-end strategy with no gaps.
🎨
Branding Instinct
I understand tone, positioning, narratives, metrics and platforms so the brand stays consistent everywhere it shows up.
🤖
AI Leverage
I'm skilled in automation. I use this to multiply delivery efforts and outputs faster without compromising quality or authenticity.
⚡
Execution Agility
I can create the strategy and execute it without leaks. I build and run the campaign, no handoff gap, no half-measures.
Core Competencies

Skills & Expertise

Built specifically for modern, high-performance marketing, taking it from the basics: strategy to execution to automation.

Core Strength
Content Marketing
Creating content that educates, engages and converts using content calendars, pillar strategies and storytelling to build reach and retention.
Core Strength
Email Marketing & Copywriting
Delivering emails that people actually open and act on. Sequences, copies and launch campaigns, persuasive, strategic and on-brand every time.
Core Strength
Paid Advertising
Facebook & Instagram ad strategy, creative direction, targeting and campaign optimisation to maximise ROAS.
Core Strength
Marketing Strategy
Building go-to-market plans, brand positioning direction and growth roadmaps that align business goals with audience reality.
Core Strength
Social Media & Influencer Strategy
Platform-native content strategy, community building and influencer partnership management that drives authentic brand growth.
Core Strength
Brand Positioning
Defining what a brand stands for, how it speaks and why it matters. Creating a market position competitors can't easily replicate.
Actively Growing
AI Automation
Implementing AI-powered workflows to streamline marketing operations, stay on top of leads, assist with customer service, accelerate content production and personalisation at scale.
Core Strength
Campaign Execution
End-to-end campaign management. Ideation, asset coordination, launch, monitoring and reporting with clear KPIs.
Actively Growing
Website Management & Web Copy
Managing and optimising sites, writing conversion-focused web copies — sales copy, landing pages, blogs — that tell brand stories and drive action.
Core Strength
Growth & Scaling
Identifying growth opportunities, building growth-focused systems and moving brands from early traction to consistent compounding growth.
Core Strength
Community Management
Building and nurturing engaged communities that become brand advocates across social platforms, newsletters and online spaces.
Actively Growing
SEO & Keywords
Learning the foundations of search, keyword thinking, content structure and on-page signals that help brands get found organically.
Services

What I Deliver

I take on early-stage brands to scaling businesses. I offer strategic marketing support that's built to perform and not just look good on paper.

01
Growth Marketing Strategy
I build marketing roadmaps that start from audience research and positioning to channel mix, content strategy and measurable growth plans tailored to your stage and goals.
GTM StrategyMarketing StrategyPositioningFunnel DesignKPI Setting

Content & Copywriting

Social Media & Influencer Marketing
Platform strategy, content planning and influencer partnership management that builds communities, earns trust and converts followers into loyal customers and advocates.

AI & Automation

Marketing Systems
Built for Scale

I design and integrate intelligent workflows that help brands market smarter, move faster and scale execution strategically, without losing the human touch that drives trust and conversion.

⚙️
Workflow & Process Automation
Designing AI-powered systems that automate repetitive marketing and business tasks. Campaign execution, lead routing, reporting and internal approvals.
📧
AI-Powered Customer Journeys
Building smarter segmentation, personalisation and nurture sequences that deliver timely, relevant messaging across email, CRM and retention channels.
📊
Predictive Insights & Decision Support
Using AI-driven analytics to uncover audience behaviour, optimise spend, forecast performance and improve campaign decisions.
🔄
Content Systems & Multi-Channel Repurposing
Turning single-source ideas into scalable distribution systems across social, email, blog, video and community touchpoints, without the manual headache.
"The future of marketing is not all about AI replacing marketers. I believe it's about marketers who use AI strategically."

I'm actively building my AI automation stack, working with tools and frameworks that streamline operations and amplify output, so brands get more without proportionally spending more.

Case Studies

Strategy in Action

Projects that demonstrate how I think, strategise and execute across industries and channels.

Case Study
Beauty & E-Commerce · Meta Ads + Influencer + Content
From Struggling to Selling Out: A Beauty Brand Revenue Revival
I developed a strategy that combined Meta ad campaigns, UGC-driven content and a storytelling-led content calendar to build brand awareness and drive consistent online revenue for a beauty brand that was struggling. I rebuilt their content positioning, launched a segmented paid campaign and activated five micro-influencers with engaged niche audiences to create authentic social proof that converted.
3.2×
ROAS achieved
+180%
Engagement lift
12wks
Campaign period
Case Study
Agency Growth · Email Funnel + Meta Ads
1,000 Sign-Ups: Email-Led Growth for a B2B Agency
I designed a complete email marketing funnel, starting with a lead magnet creation (a free class on ads targeting), a 5-part opt-in sequence to build trust, a 7-email onboarding sequence, marketing sequence and ascension sequence. Paired with a Meta awareness campaign, because what's the best way to teach ad targeting without targeting them? The campaign drove qualified traffic into the funnel, targeting decision-makers by career path, entrepreneurial skills and interest.
47%
Open rate avg.
1,000+
Sign-ups generated
8wks
Launch to results
Case Study
AI Automation · Email Intelligence System
Zero Inbox Chaos: AI Email Organisation Flow for a Professional
I designed and implemented an intelligent email workflow that automatically labels and segments incoming emails into categories such as leads, clients, collaborations and admin. Less missed opportunities, the inbox is chaos-free and fully organised with little effort.
10×
Focus output
-70%
Production time
+95%
Inbox segmentation

From the Blog

All Articles
Growth Marketing
Why Your Marketing Feels Busy But Isn't Growing Your Business
If there's one thing I've seen play out often, it has to be that a lot of brands and businesses confuse activity with strategy. As someone who has had her fair share of this experience, I know better than anyone that posting daily, running ads and sending emails doesn't mean it will automatically compound. It's important that there's a mindset shift because that shift changes everything.
Aishat Bello · 2 min read · Growth
AI & Automation
5 Quiet Ways Smart Marketers Use AI to Work Better
To be fair, you don't exactly need to be a tech person to use AI effectively, but you've to be receptive to the idea of AI assisting you in processes. As the big sister that I'm, I'll let you in on how I'm using AI and how you can mirror the system and use it to get more done.
2 min read · AI Tools
Email Marketing
The Email That Gets a Reply Every Single Time
We've been conditioned to how things are done right from the day we were born. I mean, you've to have a name so the world can distinguish you, which basically means the world has a structure. If the world has a structure, why should your emails not have one?
2 min read · Copywriting
